title: UiPath (NYSE:PATH) - Earnings & Revenue Performance - Simply Wall St
text: Simply Wall St provides historical earnings and revenue performance analysis for UiPath. Historical Revenue Performance: FY2024 $1.308B (+24% YoY), FY2025 $1.430B (+9% YoY), FY2026 $1.611B (+13% YoY). Revenue growth rate shows deceleration from high growth to more moderate rates, reflecting maturation and macro headwinds. Quarterly progression FY2026 demonstrates sequential recovery: Q1 $357M, Q2 $362M, Q3 $411M, Q4 $481M. Accelerating pattern suggests momentum regaining through year. Profitability trajectory: Company transitioned from net losses to GAAP profitability by Q4 FY2026, marking significant inflection. Non-GAAP operating margins expanded from ~20% to 23%+ with target of 30%. ARR metrics: Consistent growth with FY2026 reaching $1.611B, supporting recurring revenue model and customer retention. Net new ARR generation varying $30-60M per quarter. Earnings analysis: EPS varied from losses in prior years to profitability in recent quarters. Analyst forecasts suggest near-term earnings pressure despite revenue growth, reflecting operating leverage timing.
